The '''Kumasi system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located on the [[Tingel Arm/Legends|Tingel Arm]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Ammuud/Legends|Ammuud]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Han Solo's Revenge]]'' {{1st}}
